h2635600ag03c3g4673g935fg865b29fcdc15: Welcome back. Have you made any new discoveries?
hb5256659g6c49g4422ga867g786534578333: Welcome back. Have you made any new discoveries?
h65e0092fg4c1cg4317g842cge8d2ba1a760f: The duergar are back! Run, little mushrooms!
h8931443dgb67cg457bga392g5d450928ac24: Ah, a visitor! You're a welcome sight.
h15bb6175g016dg42degae09g6d7fd9df4f0c: Ah... wait. You're not with that damned raiding party. Apologies.
h120497bdg134eg4029gacb0g06e80ddc8073: Ah, a visitor! You're a welcome sight.
h73ca299ag012bg49bag9543g2918f00a7baa: Ah... wait. You're not with that damned raiding party. Apologies.
hb8087a07gf87bg4ff2g99bbg7249eae8ca28: But let us observe the customs of the locals.
h06b7829fg0cafg4266g9e44ga8adbbd793f3: *The scholar's brow tenses. His voice spills into your skull, the spores connecting mind to mind.*
h736098degf9f4g40b5gaf22ga034d74d2e48: Blurg, proud member of the Society of Brilliance, at your service.
h33c30912g556ag4e68g8232ga6ceea158e49: Hgh--nzzt. Or perhaps not. Your mind is far more complex than the fungi.
h38762f95g0463g48fbg8e82g39e211c5c80f: I've never heard of the Society of Brilliance.
h5c50a226g4e80g4d36gbfb4g8df5b57dbc96: Understandable. We are small in number, and rarely stay in one place for long.
hb8016df2gc96dg460ag9ffdgcfe105411d7f: Your kind tend to be slaves down here.
hbabe3802g5beag41a4gb11bgc257491e65b7: It's true that many of my brethren are enslaved here, but my intellect has secured my freedom.
h6446d38cgb01eg4ab9gbb22g47603f316e90: It is my hope that my research will lead to liberation and peace for my people.
he60a0d04gbc95g42ecg9487g7a58f8d92737: Such designs are part of why I've devoted myself to studying the myconids.
h51b5fc3bg5213g4bd0gb372g87900c0e0ffa: I've never seen a hobgoblin like you before.
hfa50d459g2098g4c05ga67eg2760a0f24a65: The feeling is mutual, friend. I have only passing familiarity with astral travellers.
h0b86eed2g4d53g45f4g9efdge16a71c125c6: The feeling is mutual, friend. I have only passing familiarity with the surface races.
h69140d1fg9058g4e27gbedcg5966a6aa4c72: But I've found that there is as much to learn from an individual as there is from a community.
h9d05173ag2b7fg42b6gbd1ag7b4b63074404: So it is with the myconids: they live in harmonious unity, but each has a unique personality.
hffbd9e15g6f24g4b3dg87d6gf69b6868f94c: Research in the Underdark sounds like a dangerous prospect.
ha3feacf2g2e7fg40abgb7f1g7c1df3c6cb07: Yes, but it has abundant natural resources. Spores, waterorbs, trillimac! I've studied them for years.
h78f9d6ebgba63g4b63gbc97ga45579dce724: *There is rare magic in the Underdark too. Faerzress. It radiates from the earth, warping teleportation and divination magic.*
hd446f1fegf397g4cf8g9ce2gc0a386f8e596: This is not a wasteland: it is a glorious ecosystem. Every civilization here could thrive without conflict!
h5220bdeag2fa5g4ec4g8aa0ge9adb5a55e80: My colleagues and I are working to improve conditions in the Underdark. This need not be such a dire, hostile place.
h0901d537g4a6fg4d8cgb4a8g540bfa7d3c2a: It's curious to find a githyanki here. What has brought you down so deep?
h50dfb11cgc876g4e25ga270g1f4a2ada1f03: It's curious to find a surface dweller here. What has brought you down so deep?
h5c8465a1g33c7g4f2bgbd61ga45915a9587d: Honestly? I kind of got lost down here.
h98f8b63eg6394g47c5gbbf4gaee992305540: A common phenomenon in the Underdark, I'm afraid.
hc2bb5376g5536g4f7ag8218g6e5cef90f534: Could I ask what you were searching for to begin with?
h8a08f78dg7f15g49b8g91d4g0f4080bbf953: I am trying to return to my people.
hdaee1ad7g6dd1g4f75gb4fcg9547d303326e: You may have trouble reaching the astral plane from here, young gith.
hffb244b5gdaa7g4259g9d24ga6ccf00e071b: Why do you not seek refuge among your own on the surface?
h730cbdb7g1350g4051gb882gd930afa8a751: A mind flayer infected me with a tadpole.
he34ba347g2bcbg4180g80c4gfd37cad73ed1: Truly remarkable! But why come to the Underdark, where they hold so much power?
hf22217cdgbf7dg4f2fga804g409124fc6111: You were infected by an illithid tadpole? It's a miracle you're still intact!
h540a3377g4282g4b61gb8d3gf9267d47dd2f: You must be worried sick, but have no fear.
h4931eac5gfbb4g4754g8235g24799a5a6d17: I have a friend who may be able to assist.
ha8a8778eg1d03g4a5fg8d01g2b2622a54e58: I hope this is important, Blurg. My zurkhwood samples need constant attention.
hd0baf309g091bg4ddbgb87dg880cfdd36813: It is! This adventurer has an illithid tadpole inside her head. But she hasn't turned.
h1d79ebaag109cg4eaag8a23g39c8928162ae: It is! This adventurer has an illithid tadpole inside his head. But he hasn't turned.
h3a104a2ag625eg4471g9d82geee5fdd22ecf: Are you looking to have it extracted?
h912d5b35g10b7g4e4ag8871gd1faa1615a7b: Yes. Its head will make a fine trophy for my queen!
h29fb5433g63a6g4155g937cga95c65749a5e: Please, hold. I understand your rage against my kin.
h7fe204d8g5fe0g42a0ga8e9g2a2816749081: My species has terrorised the Underdark for countless generations.
h7ca593ffg5878g4b22gb170gd286257c6b30: My species devastated and enslaved yours. It is unforgivable.
ha794c1bcge649g4db5ga686gef98eae52048: But I assure you, I stand with the Society of Brilliance, not the colonies of my people.
h87d410d2g5e35g4c4eg83efg755468cddcb6: |This is a traitorous thing that feeds on the peoples brains! Who knows who will into his hands if we let it go!|
h3997fd4bgbdb7g442fg856eg96a879e16137: I ask only that you refrain from violence. I respect that your opinion of my kind may be... charged.
h32623b04g323dg4d68g9a47ge97edee50370: If that settles matters for the time being... would you like a diagnosis?
hff2f9fb3g519dg4046gb946ge86b9411018a: Open your mind to me. Let us see what lurks within.
h151c238eg0856g441dga4b4g977384dc7e09: Swallow your disgust and permit the ghaik's search.
h3da0619bg3790g43d4gb6d4g7496c74b8671: *As Omeluum's mind pierces yours, the tadpole pulses with power.*
h42a7a008g786ag4821g9261gdd8ba48ccf16: *It feels ten times its size. Alive, awake. Almost smug.*
heeb79aa2g137bg45b1gbdb1g5301c78cd387: Relax and let Omeluum's mind search your own.
h7e64de69gdb75g40b9ga6f7ga91a36cc5997: Never mind. I'm done with mind flayers touching me.
h75fe4f60g2521g4fafga68cgd083c541247a: I see. I will remain here if you change your mind.
hfd45d9e1g4b13g4b78gb50ag2e239288014b: Stifle your revulsion and listen to the mind flayer.
h8ea8dac1gbd6cg46b1ga345gcaa441fa2150: You betray the very reason you were hatched into this plane.
h702af31dge0b4g44ddgbb1dgee6bcc7ef796: They infest your head and invade your dreams, and still you would parley?
h18bf6fcfg7dcag42adg9410gb28aa6b4494f: I have felt the shame of Lolth herself. I understand Omeluum.
h96c45c93g615bg413eg9aaeg41d3c477d50a: I know what it's like to be shunned. I understand Omeluum.
h3338fb26gb8c6g4daag8b10g87bac4791b0d: I've made a lot of strange allies for information. Let's hear it.
hd50c9a12g403eg4a7egad56gaf0d692233c2: The myconids wouldn't appreciate us fighting here. I'll listen.
h4a54b83agfe6cg4009g9573g38a69346a2c4: I want nothing to do with you.
h66cdebe8g0fe0g45a8g8713g64e039a571e7: Running this ghaik through would be a privilege. Attack.
h7f70ea35gea1bg4eaegbd89g6d32e4db7b81: I'd never trust a mind flayer. Attack.
h821d682ag28e5g408eg97e5g39e382144509: One of my brethren forced a tadpole into your eye. Or ear, perhaps?
ha5ebc30fg9479g44bdga3cfg1a585af698bb: Ghaik. Your head will make a fine trophy for my queen!
h2868412cgd8c7g478dgb0c7gfa999c7ad2f5: A mind flayer?! Ready for a fight.
h64c66d03g91e5g4e4cg8ae1ga5372ce91d16: I'd never trust a mind flayer. Attack.
h06255bd2g288ag4da3g94efgfa1d6e566a3c: You'll die choking on your own bile, ghaik!
hb0978c5cgf299g4396g8ecfg3abb1384fcf2: An illithid is your friend? How is that possible?
h89da23e0gf297g405cg8a92g8a92e9538ca1: I have broken free from the elder brain's yoke. I no longer serve the Grand Design.
h438a1b5bg6c5eg4547gb961g34b36e3044b0: I ask that you refrain from violence, while I respect that your opinion of my kind may not change.
ha73eb030g883bg4eb3ga7d8gd3f79f791843: A collective quest to eliminate the gith and enslave all other humanoids.
h2d2e12c9g92bbg4ad8g80a7gd8b0ab1739b2: I'm not refraining from anything. You'll die like the rest.
h70af3a53g1294g4c05gbc60g2f56378aa5e2: Forgive me. Being inquisitive is in my nature.
h845586d0g1a94g45fega9fdgf0230db13e72: I collect mushrooms to sell on the surface.
hcf3299d0g1084g4d2fgaab1g79edbf1ef1d1: Then you've come to the right place. The hybridization among fungi in this circle is truly unique.
hc2e82818gfa6bg4f90g81fdg694debc5f04d: I... see. A fine way to make a living.
hc7a70ab7gb131g4421g80e3g270bd063adc0: Our kind has suffered needlessly for generations. Do you also seek peace among the myconids?
h9e853517g6affg4f2ega4a7g4755e80a22c8: This is where I belong, but right now I can't stay.
h3e52c220gccfag466dgb733g183d01156d96: I know the feeling well. What has driven you from home?
h7b8f7412g6ebfg4e2agaf47g3ce73fd0e71a: Our peoples aren't exactly inclined to share with each other.
h36dbf6bdg0463g47dega17fgb45d8bd2bc49: And yet we are all in need. Imagine what creativity would bloom if no craftsman starved. If every wizard had spell materials!
hac5bdbaega51bg4c07g9576g593c8cbeb35c: Such is nature's balance: life thriving under adversity.
haaca2714g34cdg4723g8430g82119e9d871c: Exactly! It's such a relief to meet another sensible mind.
hf1924a38g664fg45a4g8ef4g89bba2453f17: Do you have anything interesting to trade?
hce57c695g39e3g4c22g9d2eg6fe2bc50f683: I do enjoy a good bargain, if anything in my private collection is to your liking.
hc75fbeadgf30bg4ee6g944ag84db22ca032b: Very well. I have mushrooms to catalogue.
h44949406gd2feg4981g9d44g5e9c69ea527b: Seems like you've had a run-in with my people before.
h8be6fc71g875dg4affgabe7g6e7b6a52e36d: You scoundrels attacked these peaceful villagers completely unprovoked! Filthy, dim-witted...
h6bfae646g57b4g4e3dga295g243f245d1dfc: Pardon. Sometimes my temper gets the better of me.
h482aa913g8782g41d3gb3f9gbb283968d590: I observed the fight from a distance. Combat is not my field of expertise, but the myconids handled themselves well enough.
hf2f7bb43g9e0dg4029g8c6eg9fdcf648f46e: Were you here when the duergar attacked?
h39f37c00gef7fg44c9ga109g13f47cacab89: Can you tell me more about ceremorphosis?
hb643216cg6429g4d8bgbf92gf36328b2e4fe: *Omeluum's tentacles flutter in what appears to be the mind flayer's approximation of a smile.*
h67aae1fdgb903g44begb179gb04811e080be: Excellent! Omeluum will be happy to answer all of your questions.
had823657g0230g4724gbbc1g6f795f27b886: Do you know anything about ceremorphosis?
h6f2a55cegfde7g45f9ga532g0c9192c9cd79: A fascinating topic. May I ask the reason for your interest?
h84ce0388g7462g4782g85dag6d8b1f3064b4: I'm working on a book about mind flayers.
h33d17ce7gea3eg475bg8a54g452aebff244d: I see! Well, it is the central act of mind flayer reproduction.
h71a543fcgf13eg449cg92a4g862672598196: A tadpole is inserted into a living humanoid, and within a tenday, the host is consumed to produce a new illithid.
h61fba7bcg8244g4366gb45dgdaf1a6c50b83: A fascinating process, if a touch grim.
h8af11355g9a1fg444bgbb6ag676211440ed0: Hrm. I wish you luck in your research.
h3e8fbf38gc780g4bcag9fe8g5e9d1975e47f: Can I talk to Omeluum again?
h221f82f0g3b93g479agbc62g541401d851ec: Let me see if it will answer my summons a second time.
h804d1bb2g5317g41f1gaa51geff233b1790f: Ah, the mushroom hunter! Have you made any new discoveries?
ha5467bdag238fg43d9gacadga4027260cf7c: I must complete this study. Entertain yourself elsewhere.
